results.title: Pathum Thani raid catches 121 foreign workers at industrial estate
results.description: Officials detained 121 foreign nationals during a raid on a construction site inside an industrial estate in Pathum Thani yesterday, June 11, after residents complained that Chinese nationals were allegedly taking construction jobs reserved for Thai workers. The joint operation involved the Labour Ministry’s employment protection division, Pathum Thani security officials, immigration police, and military ... The story Pathum Thani raid catches 121 foreign workers at industrial estate as seen on Thaiger News .

results.title: President Ilham Aliyev sends congratulatory letter to Vladimir Putin
Beyond the Demographic Panic
results.description: Anxieties about our ageing society are common on both the right and left, from fears of ‘civilisational replacement’ to calls for population control. Yet only politics can decide who benefits from this long-term trend.

results.title: This 'alien' blue planet rains molten glass
results.description: Scientists are stunned by HD 189733b, a blue planet 63 light-years away, resembling Earth but far more hostile. Orbiting its star in just two days, it endures scorching temperatures, supersonic winds, and glass rain. Its striking blue color stems from silicate particles scattering light, not oceans. This 'hot Jupiter' offers a stark reminder of the universe's dangerous beauty.

results.title: Hong Kong arrests 6 over World Cup fakes
results.description: HONG KONG – Hong Kong officials yesterday said they had arrested six people in a World Cup fake merchandise sting involving almost US$20 million of counterfeit goods. Eighty percent of the items seized were intended for export to the Americas, where the tournament kicked off yesterday, authorities said. Customs officers said they had seized about... results.title: Suspected ISI spy detained in Jaisalmer border area; payment deposits linked to espionage under probe
results.description: A young man, Mustaq Ali, was apprehended near the Pakistan border in Jaisalmer on suspicion of spying for the ISI. He allegedly shared sensitive Indian security information for nearly two years. Investigators found suspected payments in his bank account. Multiple agencies will interrogate him further.

results.title: Understanding ITR Filing for FY26: Key Insights and Updated Procedures
results.description: This article provides crucial insights into the Income Tax Return (ITR) filing process for FY26, highlighting the importance of timely submissions and the benefits of the Updated Income Tax Return (ITR-U) mechanism. Taxpayers can rectify past omissions and update their records for previous years, while understanding the implications of penalties for late filings. With the introduction of new provisions in Budget 2026, individuals have more flexibility in managing their tax obligations. Learn how to navigate these changes effectively to ensure compliance and avoid unnecessary financial burdens.

results.title: Commentary: American diplomacy is in a quiet crisis
results.description: The United States has more unfilled ambassadorial positions around the world than at any point in modern history. Recent reports indicate that 110 to 115 of the United States’ 195 ambassadorial posts remain vacant, a vacancy rate approaching 60 percent.
